creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@circlecafe_dxb is one of our go-to places for a wholesome breakfast! 💗

Every weekend (8AM to 4PM), Circle Cafe serves All You Can Eat Breakfast with one cup of coffee or tea for only 69 AED. You can order anything you like from the menu as long as you can finish them! 😋

What we had:
* Shakshouka
* Asian Chicksilog
* Eggs Benedict 
* English Breakfast
* Huevos Rancheros
* French Toast
* PB & B Toast

There are several Circle Cafes in Dubai. Featured in this reel is the branch in Al Razi Building in Dubai Healthcare City. 

Tag your breakfast buddies!
